name: Sacrificed to the Tentacles
description:
Scarified to the Temple of Tentacles

You and your friends being abducted and tossed into a pit wasn't what you expected today but apparently fate had other ideas. The temple of Tentacles will seek to claim you.

You can expect: Tentacles and all that implies, including, eggs, con-non-con, body transformation (including M2F potential)
creator: Slaymike
